battleTraits.name: Spectral Procession
battleTraits.effect: 1 of your Bladegheist Revenants units and 1 of your Dreadscythe Harridans units start the battle in reserve. From the second battle round onwards, you can use the 'Cackling Arrival' ability.

battleTraits.name: Cackling Arrival
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick 1 of your units in reserve.
battleTraits.effect: Set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Ethereal
battleTraits.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for friendly units.

enhancements.name: Unholy Visage
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of your general.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target must immediately use a RETREAT ability as if it were the enemy movement phase.

enhancements.name: Tales of Horror
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY or CAVALRY unit within 6" of your general.
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the battle, if the target is replaced using the ‘Call for Reinforcements’ ability, halve the number of models in the replacement unit, rounding up.

enhancements.name: Deathly Possessor
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy HERO within 12" of your general to be the target, then pick another enemy unit within the target’s combat range to be the victim.
enhancements.effect:
Roll a D3. On a 2+, pick one:
- Inflict mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
- Inflict mortal damage on the victim equal to the roll.

enhancements.name: Spectral Howl
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.

regimentAbilities.name: Discorporate
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: Mounting Dread
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, subtract the current battle round number from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with the target.

abilities.name: Captured Soul Energy
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Another Link in the Chain
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if this unit is wholly within 12" of any friendly Spirit Torments. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

abilities.name: Thrashing Desperation
abilities.effect: While this unit contests an objective you control, enemy units cannot end a charge move within ½" of this unit unless the unmodified charge roll was 5 or more.

abilities.name: Harrowing Shrieks
abilities.effect: Enemy units cannot be healed or have slain models returned to them while they are in combat with this unit.

weapons.name: Ethereal Steed’s Ghostly Hooves and Teeth

abilities.name: Phantasmal Discorporation
abilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
abilities.effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
